action.reasoning: Observation: Training with q_weight=1.0 completed for 35 epochs. fix_mask.py ran and masked 11 ptend_q features. Per-feature R² shows good values for most features (0.2-0.99), with 11 problematic upper-atmosphere humidity tendency features masked. Best eval mean_r2 is 0.5206 from iter 4. Analysis: Need to submit eval to measure actual mean_r2 with this model and compare. The zero_mask has been properly applied. Decision: Submit eval immediately to check performance, then decide on further improvements based on results.
